title: Pokeblocks
description: Adds Pokemon-themed dolls/blocks to your world
body:
# Pokeblocks This mod will add new decoration blocks to your game for you to find while you are exploring! All of these are Pokemon themed, as this was created as a collectible decoration mod for Cobblemon. Figurines of our friends are also within this mod to collect, as originally this was going to be a private mod. <3 ## Currently Added Pokedolls All dolls listed also have shiny variants to find!
Spoiler **Common**: - Bulbasaur - Charmander - Squirtle - Smoliv - Rellor - Happiny - Swinub - Drifloon - Rookidee - Wailmer - Rowlet - Treecko - Snorunt - Spheal - Luvdisc **Uncommon**: - Lickitung - Mareep - Dolliv - Arboliva - Wooper - Gastly - Shellder - Sandygast - Pumpkaboo - Bellossom - Piloswine - Delibird - Cubchoo - Cetoddle **Rare**: - Posing Bulbasaur - Flaaffy - Snorlax - Sentret - Furret - Munchlax - Rabsca - Wartortle - Quagsire - Corvisquire - Eevee - Cloyster - Wailord - Phantump - Glalie - Eiscue - Frigibax **Epic**: - Calyrex - Ampharos - Applin Basket - Sableye - Absol - Ivysaur - Magikarp Fishbowl - Stonjourner - Tropius - Palossand - Mimikyu - Riolu - Froslass - Beartic - Animated Cubchoo **Legendary**: - Animated Calyrex - ??? - Venusaur - Blastoise - Gengar - Corviknight - Gholdengo - Netherite Gholdengo - Kyogre - Trevenant - Marshadow - Marshadow Zenith Forme - Animated Snorunt Family - Skibidi Mewlet
## How to find Pokedolls Most vanilla Minecraft structures have a 30% chance of containing a Pokedoll or decoration item within them. The chance of pulling dolls is based on their rarities. The higher the rarity, the less likely you will be to find it! All structures containing these chances are listed below:
Loot Tables ``` LootTables.END_CITY_TREASURE_CHEST, LootTables.SIMPLE_DUNGEON_CHEST, LootTables.VILLAGE_WEAPONSMITH_CHEST, LootTables.VILLAGE_TOOLSMITH_CHEST, LootTables.VILLAGE_ARMORER_CHEST, LootTables.VILLAGE_CARTOGRAPHER_CHEST, LootTables.VILLAGE_MASON_CHEST, LootTables.VILLAGE_SHEPARD_CHEST, LootTables.VILLAGE_BUTCHER_CHEST, LootTables.VILLAGE_FLETCHER_CHEST, LootTables.VILLAGE_FISHER_CHEST, LootTables.VILLAGE_TANNERY_CHEST, LootTables.VILLAGE_TEMPLE_CHEST, LootTables.VILLAGE_DESERT_HOUSE_CHEST, LootTables.VILLAGE_PLAINS_CHEST, LootTables.VILLAGE_TAIGA_HOUSE_CHEST, LootTables.VILLAGE_SNOWY_HOUSE_CHEST, LootTables.VILLAGE_SAVANNA_HOUSE_CHEST, LootTables.ABANDONED_MINESHAFT_CHEST, LootTables.NETHER_BRIDGE_CHEST, LootTables.STRONGHOLD_LIBRARY_CHEST, LootTables.STRONGHOLD_CROSSING_CHEST, LootTables.STRONGHOLD_CORRIDOR_CHEST, LootTables.DESERT_PYRAMID_CHEST, LootTables.JUNGLE_TEMPLE_CHEST, LootTables.IGLOO_CHEST_CHEST, LootTables.WOODLAND_MANSION_CHEST, LootTables.PILLAGER_OUTPOST_CHEST, LootTables.BASTION_TREASURE_CHEST, LootTables.BASTION_OTHER_CHEST, LootTables.BASTION_BRIDGE_CHEST, LootTables.BASTION_HOGLIN_STABLE_CHEST, LootTables.ANCIENT_CITY_CHEST, LootTables.ANCIENT_CITY_ICE_BOX_CHEST ```
## Gigantic Variants! If you collect four of the same Pokedoll and surround a piece of wool with them, you can make **Gigantic** variants! These variants are double the size of the normal dolls! ### Support Us! We created this mod as a silly little thing originally just for some friends. Upon releasing it publicly, we would have never expected the interest it had gained. If you would ever like to support us, consider buying us a coffee!
